response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web software engineer with broad language exposure (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but lacks the core qualifications for a Principal Performance Architect role focused on AI accelerator hardware. No evidence of SoC/IP modeling, deep neural network optimization, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD experience, or hardware-software co-design. Educational background is a BS in Computer Science without the specialized hardware/AI accelerator engineering depth this principal-level IC role requires.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) of professional software development across diverse domains
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Brief embedded/C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator hardware experience
No deep neural network training/inference optimization background
No SIMD/MIMD architecture or hardware-software co-design experience

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC hardware expertise
No deep learning / GPU workload optimization background
